data.title: How to win with Yve.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Sora can frequently dodge moves while quickly killing us. Her multi-stage mobility is also very annoying, so we need to maintain a good distance.

counters.counter_desc: Both heroes have damage and control abilities, and working together can be extremely powerful. They are also great for duo climbing.

dominants.dominant_desc: The most important thing is to stay alive while disrupting the enemy, so you can maximize your effectiveness. In the early game, you can be more aggressive since you have passive protection and your early damage isn't high, allowing you to frequently enter and exit the enemy's jungle to cause disruption. In the late game, you should participate in team fights more, as your ultimate and second skill are very helpful in team battles. Hope you enjoy it.

emblems.emblem_desc: Reducing cooldown helps release skills faster, and speeding up in the jungle can accelerate support, giving more advantage.

equips.equip_desc: This kind of equipment allows you to quickly use skills to kill enemies, whether facing tanks or marksmen. Its damage remains sufficient in the late game, and it can also provide both control and damage.

hero.hero_overview: As a hero with high slow and frequent damage output, they possess strong lane control ability throughout the early, mid, and late game. In the early game, they can frequently use their first and second skills to harass opponents. In the mid to late game, they can continuously wear down the frontline and use their ultimate to disrupt the backline heroes, helping to secure victory in matches.
hero.hero_strength: Frequent use of release skills can influence the battlefield, and buying items that reduce healing and magic resistance can better expand your advantage.
hero.hero_weakness: Although the shield provided by the passive increases survivability, it is still easy to be instantly killed by assassins and other heroes. Therefore, you can use skills like Flash, and you should also pay attention to your positioning and the timing of your ultimate to avoid dying in team fights.

data.recommend: Hope you can reach mythic as sooon as possible

spell.spell_desc: Flicker can be used in the early game to invade the enemy jungle and disrupt their farming, or to escape danger, making it the best choice.

data.title: Best mage to reach mythic

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tanky Frontline Heroes with Crowd Control is the Perfect Match for her as she needs a teammate that can be in the Frontline and crowd control the enemies in place for her to do High Damage.

counters.counter_desc: With Kadita as the enemy, Yve has the risk of Kadita's burst even within the backline as Kadita's First Skill can ignore any control skills making her a counter for Yve.
Heroes like Fanny, Ling, and Lancelot are the worst Match up for her as they can easily counter her Ultimate and reach her from the Backline
Heroes with Suppression Skills like Franco and Kaja are also bad for her.

dominants.dominant_desc:
When using Yve, it is important to maximize her Passive as this can be helpful for survivability. Her 2nd Skill and Passive can help identify whether the enemies are hiding in a bush. 

Just like any other heroes, Yve has counters. As a Mage with very low mobility, Assassin Heroes are her worst enemies, Their mobility can make easily make Yve miss her skill and not activate her passive—making her a squishy target. Another Good Counter would be Artillery Heroes like Novaria and Pharsa as their Long Range Skills would be a nuisance for dominating her lane, with Artillery Mage, They can avoid getting poked by Yve and still fast clear the lane while maintaining a good distance.

emblems.emblem_desc: As a Mage, The Mage Emblem is the best choice for her. As for Emblem Talents, Rupture or Agility can be useful for her as Rupture can provide extra Penetration while Agility provides extra mobility for her, Wilderness for faster rotation and is helpful for team fights when contesting with objectives like the Turtle or The Lord. Lastly, Impure Rage is the best pick for her as this talent provides extra damage with skills and can recover her mana.

equips.equip_desc:
Demon Boots can provide the Mana Regen that Yve needs for her spammable First Skill. 

Glowing Wand is A MUST, Useful for Team fights especially if the enemy uses Spell Vamp, Lifesteal, or has a support teammate that can Heal.

Blood Wings for the Shield and Movement Speed it provides, crucial for survivability.

Holy Crystal can vastly increase her Damage, Making her Poking Capabilities easier.

Winter Crown (interchangeable with Immortality) for Survivability.

Queen's Wings provides her with Spell Vamp, HP, and it's passive "Demonize" which is useful for Survivability. Cooldown Reduction may not significantly benefit her damage source (First Skill) but it can help reduce the cooldown of her 2nd  and Ultimate Skill that can be used for Zoning the Enemy Team. Adaptive Attack and Passive "Defiance" for extra damage.

hero.hero_overview: Yve is a Mage who can easily control the battle with her skills.
hero.hero_strength: In Laning, Yve can fast clear the minion wave due to her spammable First Skill. Her Ultimate can control the battle with it's range, crowd control, and damage while staying protected in the backlane. Her Poking capabilities is one of the best and can easily dominate her lane from Early to Late Game. Yve's Passive also provides her with shield and speed that can help with surviving and running away from enemies.
hero.hero_weakness: Like every hero, Yve also has a few weakness, One of which is that she has no blink skill which is important in survival and chasing enemies. Her Ultimate also makes her unable to move from the spot, making her a target in team fight and relying on teammates to protect her.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker suits her the best as with this battle spell, she can be rid of her No-Blink Skill Weakness. Another Option would be Purify and is mostly used when the enemy has a lot of crowd control skills.

dominants.dominant_desc: In the early game, focus on clearing waves and poking from a safe distance while managing mana with Demon Boots and avoiding overextension. In the mid game, use Real World Manipulation for zoning during objectives and stay behind tanks to maximize damage. In the late game, position wisely in team fights, use Winter Crown for survivability, and target squishy enemies with Divine Glaive and Holy Crystal while staying with your team.
dominants.dominant_title: Before Level 4, focus on farming and poking with Void Blast while staying safe near the turret. During team fights, position yourself at the backline, use Real World Manipulation to zone enemies, and

emblems.emblem_desc: The Mage Emblem with Rupture, Wilderness Blessing, and Impure Rage is ideal for Yve as it boosts her damage output through Magic Penetration and Magic Power, while Impure Rage enhances her sustainability by restoring mana or health. Wilderness Blessing improves her movement speed in the jungle and river, giving her better mobility for positioning and escaping danger.

hero.hero_overview: Yve is a mage hero in Mobile Legends known for her exceptional zoning, crowd control, and burst damage capabilities. Her abilities allow her to control team fights with her Real World Manipulation (Ultimate) and deal consistent damage over time. She excels in mid-lane, providing strong poke, vision, and utility for her team.
hero.hero_strength: Yve excels in zoning enemies with her ultimate, dealing long-range damage, and providing crowd control through slows. She has strong team utility by offering vision and control during fights, while her passive grants her additional survivability with shields.
hero.hero_weakness: Yve is immobile and vulnerable to crowd control, which can interrupt her ultimate. She is fragile, heavily reliant on skill positioning, and requires good mana management, especially in the early game.

data.recommend: This guide offers essential strategies and equipment builds to help you master Yve in Mobile Legends. Follow it to enhance your gameplay and dominate the battlefield with her powerful abilities.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker allows Yve to teleport a short distance in a specified direction, giving her a much-needed escape tool or repositioning option during team fights. This spell compensates for her lack of mobility, enabling her to avoid enemy assassins, reposition for optimal use of her Real World Manipulation (Ultimate), or chase down fleeing opponents.

counters.counter_desc: Most Kagura users will quickly use up their utility for combos, rendering their means of escape useless. Yve's slow will slowly eat away any life she has left.
Vexana's kit won't do anything to your Yve because of her shield and her unmovable ult. Also vexana is slow as hell so Yve can spam her taps and burst more effectively than Pharsa can.
just don't her ult locks her in place and that's a free kill for harley

lesley relies HEAVILY on her basic attacks and her skills as means to escaping fights, therefore by slowing Lesley faster than she can reach the clash, she won't have enough time to catch up and use her basic attacks & leave her completely open for any lurkers such as Saber and the exp laners.

but like if you flop to initiate contact with her first before she does to you she'll kill you so

dominants.dominant_desc:
Buy mana necklace and prioritize the white book immediately after, then obviously buying enchanted talisman after. 

As level 3, notify the roamer to clear your mid wave then visit & share the minion wave with the exp lane. This strategy will allow your team to quickly access your ults ESPECIALLY yours since it's for zoning the turtle.
Maximize your first and second skills first. Leave your ultimate as level 1 as it's only viable utility is it's slowing swipe.

Swipe everything first before tapping. From the escape routes the enemies may use to the enemies themselves, SWIPE EVERYTHING. This will immediately apply your slow wand and glowing wand to the enemies and stack your slows as you tap them.
Don't scout alone unless you're taking a safe route. Yve cannot sustain for herself, so always have someone to trade a kill for your death, or even protect you from death.

emblems.emblem_desc: Mage emblem is obvious, but wilderness blessing and bargain hunter are interchangeable based on the user's preference, as well as agility and rupture.

equips.equip_desc:
This is the generic build i use !!

I haven't the right data because i prefer a higher shield from blood wings, but blood wings and holy crystal can be replaced by another items by preference. 

Preferably, one of those items should have a 10% cd to fully get 45% cooldown reduction !!! (5% from emblem, 20% on talisman, and 10% from boots make up 35% cooldown reduc)

It's really just the same gameplay when roaming but i keep my ult on level 1 while fully maximizing my first and second skill

(the genius wand is there to decrease enemy def for your mid laner mage)

hero.hero_overview: Yve's use rate has been very VERY low since her nerf that destroyed her unique character to oblivion. But Yve can still dominate the battlefield with her excellent slowing skills that renders blink skills useless.
hero.hero_strength:
As Yve's kit gives her high movement speed while slowing the enemy, she can endlessly poke the enemies and immediately get to a safe position. 

This allows her to utilize glowing wand & slow wand to it's highest potential while taking space unlike the likes of Chang'e, whose movement speed skill is only in her second skill & Xavier, whose spammable skills can immobilize and increase movement speed is still limited to a combo.
hero.hero_weakness: Besides her incredible movement speed, her lack of damage and range is her most inept weakness. This gives her the disadvantage of other more popular mages because of her lack of burst potential-but when picked rightfully with heroes like Atlas and Popol, her slows will pave the way for victory.

spell.spell_desc: Sprint is way way WAY more better than flicker. It's 20 second earlier than flicker, and also gives slow immunity to the user. With Yve's kit, sprint will make her even more annoying due of her fast speed that enemies may never catch up and endless pokes that will slowly tear the enemy hp down.

hero.hero_overview:
Yve needs to have a new skin, like epic or collector
skin, so that many players will use her again, I feel like she's so close to be a forgotten hero, I rarely see a player using yve. She's a strong mage and fun to use, I hope they will make a new skin for her soon.
hero.hero_strength: She's a mid laner hero, but she always need to give vision, poke the enemies and support the team always.
hero.hero_weakness: Mobility I think, compared to kagura or pharsa they can easily escaped from danger, yve cannot easily escape, unless there's a good tank in your team.

dominants.dominant_desc: Here are some tips: Yve can do fast clear together with her 1st and 2nd skill, all you have to do is drop the crystal (2nd skill) at the back minions and slide it towards you, and make sure you aim in the center her first skill.

equips.equip_desc: Enchanted talisman, Ice Queen Wand and Glowing Wand is the essence to maximize Yve's fullest potential. Brute Force Breastplate is optional.
equips.equip_title: 45% cd reduction for spamming and poking

hero.hero_overview: Yve, the Astrowarden, is a powerful mage hero in MLBB with a fascinating backstory deeply intertwined with the game's lore. Her history is a tale of cosmic conflict, ancient enemies, and a relentless pursuit of justice.
hero.hero_strength:
Yve is a powerful mage hero with a high skill ceiling, capable of dealing massive damage and controlling the battlefield from afar. Her ultimate, Real World Manipulation, can deal massive damage to multiple enemies, turning the tide of team fights.

In terms of wave clearing, Yve's abilities allow her to clear waves efficiently, giving her an advantage in lane control. Her Void Blast can clear minion waves quickly, allowing her to focus on farming or roaming to support her team.
hero.hero_weakness: Yve is a mage, meaning she is fragile and lacks the durability to engage in close combat. She relies on her range and skills to deal damage and avoid getting caught by enemy fighters or assassins.

data.recommend: Yve can and will dominate the match, if you have the knowledge— you will.

spell.spell_desc: Yve is vulnerable for some assassins, she needs an adequate mobility.
